title: CommandExecute
description: Method `command/execute` (host → ext, request). Runs a slash-command the extension registered at handshake (or later via `registry/update`). The extension may surface text back to the session via the result's `content`.

command.description: Slash-command name, without the leading `/` (bare name, no `<extension>.` prefix).

arguments.description: Free-form command arguments, e.g. parsed flags/positional text following the slash-command invocation.

content.description: Text to surface into the session as the command's output.
